summary: Reframed the opening to avoid repeating Chapter 8's time-led construction and added a brief weather handoff to support the overnight rain transition into the next chapter.
edits: Rewrote the first paragraph to open on Aminul's action instead of a matching 'By ... morning' scaffold.
Preserved the schoolhouse heat, paperwork pressure, and Friday-prayer timing in the revised opening.
Added a brief metallic pre-rain cue before the final lane exchange to bridge into Chapter 8's storm-soaked morning.
